input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.5.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.5.2
            TITLE: temperatures (considering measurement accuracy) must stay below the lower of the two:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.5.2: Temperatures (considering measurement accuracy) must stay below the lower of the two:
EV.7.5.2 Temperatures (considering measurement accuracy) must stay below the lower of the two:  
• The maximum cell temperature limit stated in the cell data sheet 
• 60°C

final_answer:
EV.7.5.2 Temperatures (considering measurement accuracy) must stay below the lower of the two:
• The maximum cell temperature limit stated in the cell data sheet
• 60°C
